creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Keyword: mailindex?

<docs.freebsd.org/mail/> in chronological order: 

> 1994
> …
> 2021
> this week

----

<https://docs.freebsd.org/mail/archive/freebsd-questions.html> in reverse chronological order: 

* appears to have this week, alone, for 2022

* appears to lack a '2021' heading for the months December to January. 

For the final (uppermost) listing in 2021, <https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mailindex.cgi?sort=date&file=archive/2021/freebsd-questions/20211203.freebsd-questions> in chronological order: 

> Last update: Sun Dec 5 3:50:41 2021 

– I imagine that the absence of a 2021 heading somehow relates to there being no subsequent update; nothing spanning the transition from 2021 to 2022.
